scripts.test:qa:ios2: node scripts/run-with-env.cjs QA_IOS2_FORCE=1 IOS_UDID_2=00008030-0009316A2EDA802E IOS_APPIUM_PORT_2=5006 -- playwright test -c qa.config.ts --project=qa-ios-2
scripts.test:qa:aos:2: node scripts/run-with-env.cjs QA_WORKERS=2 QA_AOS2_FORCE=1 -- playwright test -c qa.config.ts --project=qa-aos --project=qa-aos-2
scripts.test:qa:4way: node scripts/run-with-env.cjs QA_WORKERS=4 QA_IOS2_FORCE=1 QA_AOS2_FORCE=1 -- playwright test -c qa.config.ts --project=qa-ios --project=qa-ios-2 --project=qa-aos --project=qa-aos-2
scripts.env:versions: node -v && npm -v && npx appium -v && npm ls webdriverio --depth=0
